reviews.review_description: Total waist of money. It is a useless tutorial of 1 surgery.  Minimal effort. Should be tittled knee tutorial walk through
This simulation game provided me a deep understanding of knee surgery in an easy-to-follow way. It’s a must-try for anyone curious about medical procedures, will help you learn in an intresting way.

The experience gave me a hands-on feel of knee surgery, this is made for both educational and engaging purpose. The visuals and step-by-step guidance were very understanding! I loved this game. Highly recommended.
This game is terrible it kept teleporting me into this wall. Every time I tried grabbing something and there’s only one thing to this game for eight dollars ￼ is a scam ￼

developer_response.body:
Hi

We apologies for the bug you faced. We request if you can send details on sitechlabs@gmail.com . We can check your issue and revert back as it seems working fine on other devices. Please let us know how can we help you.

Hi
Please let us know what did you not like.  We are pleased to help you

reviews.review_title: Getting stuck early into knee surgery
reviews.review_description: While I am doing the knee replacement simulation I can pick up the blood pressure cough and the scalpel and the retractor and the drill, but I cannot drill into the knee bone. I feel the haptic drill running but when I put it on the knee and pull the trigger it doesn't do anything. I have tried over and over again but I am stuck. Any suggestions?￼

developer_response.body:
Hi , Apologies that you had this experience , you can deep drill more and get your hands with drill a bit more in depth in knee and may find it working. Please feel free to contact support at sitechlabs@gmail.com for further personalised free support on this.

Thank you

RAAL Team

reviews.review_description: The as it is strps are replicated. Wish to get it to all those interested in surgery for knee replacement. Waiting for more such..
